title: fastANI analysis protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9t6q7","text":"this is the protocol to conduct ani analysis between groups of genomes using fastANI and produce the heatmap figure in R using the pheatmap package","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: mkdir analysis query_genomes reference_genomes Create directories mkdir analysis query_genomes, reference_genomes create dirs for each of analysis, query genomes and reference genomes
move to query dir move to query genomes dir cd query_genomes change dir to query_genomes

For this there there needs to be two files, one listing query genomes and one listing reference genomes, each with a single filename per line. Suggested names for these files = query_list.txt, reference_list.txt
Copy query_list.txt cp XXXXXXXX/query_list.txt . Copy query_list.txt to query_genomes dir, where XXXXXXXX is location of query_list.txt

link query genomes to query_genomes dir while read i; do ln -s YYYYYYYY/${i} .;done loop through query_list.txt and link each query genomes to query_genomes dir. YYYYYYYY is the location of the genome fasta files
Create directory structure and link files
move to reference dir move to reference genomes dir cd ../reference_genomes change dir to reference_genomes dir
Copy reference_list.txt cp ZZZZZZZZ/reference_list.txt . Copy reference_list.txt to reference_genomes dir, where ZZZZZZZZ is location of reference_list.txt

link reference genomes to reference_genomes dir while read i; do ln -s YYYYYYYY/${i} .;done loop through reference_list.txt and link each reference genomes to reference_genomes dir. YYYYYYYY is the location of the genome fasta files
create reference genome list ls *fasta > ref_list.txt create reference and query genome list files for fastANI input
check soft links and remove bad links check softlinks and remove any that don't work find . -xtype l | xargs rm check softlinks and remove any that don't work
check softlinks and remove any that don't work find . -xtype l | xargs rm
create query genome list ls *fasta > query_list.txt
move to analysis dir cd ../analysis move to directory to be used for the analysis step

softlink all necessary files to analysis directory ln -s ../reference_genomes/ref_list.txt .ln -s ../reference_genomes/*fasta .ln -s ../query_genomes/query_list.txt .ln -s ../query_genomes/query_list.txt . softlink all necessary files to the analysis directory to be used in the fastANI analysis

Perform fastANI analysis fastANI --rl reflist.txt --ql querylist.txt --matrix -o fastANI_out perform the fastANI analysis of the query genomes vs the reference genomes-rl specifies reference list of genomes-ql specifies query genome list-matrix outputs a bottom half triangular matrix of results-o specifies output file prefixthis step can also be submitted to job queue on HPC cluster.

reformat fastANI output git clone https://github.com/jh288/fastANI_reformatter.git the output of fastANI is not in a suitable format to produce figure but this is addressed with a simple script available from github
reformat fastANI output for figure prep fastANI_reformater.pl fastANI_out > fastANI_out_reformat.tab reformat fastANI output for use in the R package pheatmap to create the figure
produce heatmap figure in R

edit matrix tab file sed 's/.fasta//g' fastANI_out_reformat.tab > fastANI_out_reformat_ed.tabsed -i 's/_/ /g' fastANI_out_reformat_ed.tab remove ".fasta" and substitute spaces for underscores in taxa names
produce heatmap in R ##load librarieslibrary("pheatmap")library("RColorBrewer")##load matrix into dataframeb1 r code to produce heatmap of fastANI results.
creator: james Harrison
